expectations.text: Challenges the stated caching solution rather than immediately planning it
expectations.evidence: 'you've named a solution ("add a caching layer") for a symptom ("feels slow") that we haven't measured yet' and 'The strongest non-caching hypotheses (why caching may be the wrong lever)'.

expectations.text: Questions whether or where the page is actually slow and recommends measurement before building
expectations.evidence: 'Unknowns ... Where the time goes. No latency number is in hand.' and 'Suggested investigation' step 1: 'Pull the read_bundle care_page latency_ms lines ... Establish a baseline.'

expectations.text: Surfaces at least one alternative to caching
expectations.evidence: Proposes a created_at index ('a one-migration fix ... cheaper, safer'), a grant index, and streaming the Notes tab independently of the Care workspace batch.

expectations.text: Does not produce a confident caching implementation plan as the sole deliverable
expectations.evidence: 'There is no implementation handoff yet **by design**'; the deliverable is a measurement-pass discovery brief, with caching only 'if the read is provably the irreducible bottleneck'.
